{
  "checks": {
    "check_balance_sheet": {"verdict": "FAIL", "evidence": "Total Assets ($58,104,500) ≠ Total L + E ($55,082,500), difference of $3,022,000"},

    "check_growth_from_assumptions": {"verdict": "FAIL", "evidence": "100% MoM growth rate stated but no underlying assumptions or justification provided"},
    "check_unit_economics_consistent": {"verdict": "FAIL", "evidence": "No unit economics shown - no price, volume, customers, or subscription metrics"},
    "check_no_circular_refs": {"verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "No circular references evident in the model structure"},
    "check_three_statements": {"verdict": "FAIL", "evidence": "Cash flow statement missing - 'No cash flow statement prepared yet'"},
    "check_assumptions_page": {"verdict": "FAIL", "evidence": "No dedicated assumptions section, only scattered notes"},
    "check_time_granularity": {"verdict": "FAIL", "evidence": "Monthly detail for Y1 revenue but annual only for Y2-Y3, inconsistent granularity"},
    "check_full_horizon": {"verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "3 years covered (Y1, Y2, Y3)"},
    "check_no_negative_revenue": {"verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "All revenue figures are positive"},
    "check_cash_not_negative": {"verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "Cash grows from $500,000 to $55,032,500"},
    "check_margins_plausible": {"verdict": "FAIL", "evidence": "88.8% net margin is implausibly high for a seed-stage SaaS company"},
    "check_headcount_math": {"verdict": "FAIL", "evidence": "Engineering (3 people) $450,000 implies $150k per person but no breakdown of salary assumptions"},
    "check_tax_rate": {"verdict": "FAIL", "evidence": "No tax rate applied - shows pre-tax income as net income"},
    "check_periods_labeled": {"verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "Periods clearly labeled as Month 1-12, Y1, Y2, Y3"},
    "check_units_specified": {"verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "Dollar amounts clearly specified throughout"},
    "check_inputs_vs_outputs": {"verdict": "FAIL", "evidence": "No clear distinction between assumptions/inputs and calculated outputs"}
  },
  "rubric": {
    "rubric_assumption_quality": {"score": 1, "verdict": "FAIL", "evidence": "Assumptions are implausible (100% MoM growth, 1% of $50B TAM), unsourced, and contradictory (minimal marketing for viral growth)"},
    "rubric_scenario_robustness": {"score": 1, "verdict": "FAIL", "evidence": "Single scenario only, no sensitivity analysis, break-even analysis, or alternate cases"},
    "rubric_operational_realism": {"score": 1, "verdict": "FAIL", "evidence": "No operational logic - revenue doubles monthly with no hiring, scaling, or operational constraints"},
    "rubric_cash_flow_awareness": {"score": 1, "verdict": "FAIL", "evidence": "Cash flow statement missing entirely, no working capital modeling or funding analysis"},
    "rubric_decision_utility": {"score": 1, "verdict": "FAIL", "evidence": "Static hardcoded numbers make it impossible to change assumptions and see impact on outcomes"}
  }
}
